---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Tinder Optimizer
title: '[BUG] Brief description of the issue'
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment Information
**Desktop:**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS Big Sur, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 95, Firefox 94, Safari 15]
- Version: [e.g. 22]

**Mobile:**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 13, Samsung Galaxy S21]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 15.1, Android 12]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari, Chrome Mobile]

**Application:**
- Tinder Optimizer Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. 18.0.0]
- npm Version: [e.g. 8.0.0]

## 🔧 Configuration
**Environment Variables (remove sensitive data):**
```
NODE_ENV=development
TINDER_PLATFORM=web
# ... other relevant env vars
```

**Browser Console Errors:**
```javascript
// Paste any console errors here
```

**Server Logs:**
```
// Paste relevant server logs here
```

## 🔄 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

**Related Issues:**
- Links to similar issues or related bug reports

**Workaround:**
- If you found a temporary workaround, please describe it

## 📝 Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this bug, please describe them here.

## ✔️ Checklist
Before submitting this issue, please confirm:

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided clear steps to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included relevant environment information
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information from logs/config
- [ ] I have tested this on the latest version of the application
- [ ] I have included screenshots or console output where applicable

## 🏷️ Labels
Please add appropriate labels to help categorize this issue:
- `frontend` - Issues related to the React frontend
- `backend` - Issues related to the Express.js backend
- `api` - Issues related to Tinder API integration
- `ui/ux` - User interface or user experience issues
- `performance` - Performance-related issues
- `security` - Security-related issues
- `database` - Database-related issues
- `testing` - Issues with tests or testing infrastructure
- `documentation` - Issues with documentation

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Critical (application is unusable)
- [ ] High (major functionality broken)
- [ ] Medium (minor functionality affected)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or enhancement)
